prompt: I've completed a major feature implementation, dispatch the code-reviewer agent to review my work
Before merging to main, request a code review and verify my implementation meets requirements
After each task in this multi-task implementation, request a code review to catch issues early
My tests are failing with unexpected behavior, help me debug the root cause
Implementation is complete, help me decide whether to merge locally or open a pull request
Write a failing test first before implementing this new feature
